projects.name: Enterprise AI Document Assistant (RAG System)
bullets: Architected a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system using Python and LangChain to automate information extraction across 5,000+ enterprise documents, achieving 92% retrieval precision.
Implemented a vector search pipeline using Pinecone with tuned chunking strategies (512-token segments with overlap), delivering semantic search responses in under 500ms.
Leveraged GitHub Copilot and Cursor to develop FastAPI endpoints and React.js dashboards, reducing the end-to-end development cycle by 40%.
Integrated AWS S3 for document storage, enabling semantic search results in under 500ms for complex queries.

projects.name: NotchSafe — macOS Productivity Utility
bullets: Engineered a native macOS utility using Swift and SwiftUI that transforms the MacBook notch into an interactive hub for encrypted storage and clipboard management.
Integrated AES-256-GCM encryption and Touch ID biometric authentication, ensuring secure file handling with zero external dependencies.
Designed a persistent clipboard monitoring system using NSEvent, resulting in a lightweight footprint (<5MB binary) and minimal system memory usage.

projects.name: SmartHealth iOS: AI-Driven Wellness Tracker
bullets: Developed a native iOS application using Swift and CoreML to provide real-time wellness insights based on user activity and behavioral data.
Integrated a local NLP model for automated journaling and sentiment analysis of daily health logs.
